name: session-wrap-skill
description: Universal AI agent memory persistence — auto-save project context at session end. Works with Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, Cursor, Windsurf, Cline, Roo Code, Copilot, Amp, OpenClaw, and more.
author: redredchen01

scripts.postinstall:
echo '
📦 session-wrap-skill installed!

To activate:
  Claude Code: cp node_modules/session-wrap-skill/SKILL.md ~/.claude/skills/session-wrap/SKILL.md
  Cursor:      cp node_modules/session-wrap-skill/SKILL.md .cursor/rules/session-wrap.mdc
  OpenClaw:    cp node_modules/session-wrap-skill/SKILL.md ~/.openclaw/skills/session-wrap/SKILL.md
  Others:      See README.md for platform-specific instructions
'
